_comment: Manual corrections applied AFTER the API fetch (override always wins and persists across fetches). Use when football-data.org reports a wrong score, or to show a just-finished match before the feed flips it to FINISHED. group format: {"<mid>": [home, away]}. ko format: {"<mid>": [homeES, awayES, homeGoals, awayGoals, advancingTeamES, penH?, penA?]} — homeGoals/awayGoals are the on-pitch (regulation) score; penH/penA are the shootout tally (shown FIFA-style 1(2)). Entries auto-remove once the API reports that match FINISHED with a matching value. Current: ko mid83 = Portugal 2-1 Croacia, Portugal avanza (reported final; API still IN_PLAY at 2-2, auto-removes when it reports FINISHED matching).
